name: Agent
description: Masters of stealth and guile — thieves, spies, and information-gatherers who rely on speed and wits over brute force. They excel at thievery, stealth, investigation, and scouting, striking from blindsides and shadows. Paths are the Alchemist and the Infiltrator.
resource_notes: No profession-specific pool. Agent uses Ambition (universal). Alchemist path adds a craftable-concoction pool (see Concoction Kit).

feats.name: Undercut
feats.description: While Hidden, Obscured, or with an ally in your Engagement, and using a weapon with the Light trait, add additional weapon dice based on your Tier (Tier 1-2: +1 die; Tier 3-4: +2 dice; Tier 5: +3 dice). Referenced by Mercenary Manuscripts.

feats.name: Agile
feats.description: While wearing light or no armor and not using a shield, attacks that would target your Armor defense instead target your Agile Defense = 10 + your light armor bonus (if any) + the higher of your Brawn or Mind. Does not function in medium or heavy armor. (Source: higher of Body or Mind — Body encoded as Brawn; verify.)

feats.name: Tread Lightly
feats.description: Reduce the cost of the Hide action by 1 AP.

feats.name: Skill Expert
feats.description: Select two V.I.T.A.L.S. skills to gain Expertise in (increased dice size).

boons.prompt: Choose two skills to gain Expertise in

feats.name: Grand Luck
feats.description: When an attack would hit you, use the Dodge action, giving the attacker Strain to hit. If the attack still hits, reduce the damage by half.

feats.name: Masterful Skill
feats.description: Choose either another V.I.T.A.L.S. skill to gain Proficiency and Expertise in, or upgrade a skill you already have Expertise in by another dice size.
